user_message: Can you pull the context on Pacific Northwest Outfitters? I need to draft the follow-up.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Andrew Taylor <andrew.taylor@pacificnorth.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-02-19 17:39 EST
Subject: QBR preparation - Action Required

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about QBR preparation. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
To: Andrew Taylor <andrew.taylor@pacificnorth.com>
Date: 2024-01-24 11:34 EST
Subject: URGENT: QBR preparation Issue at Pacific Northwest Outfitters

There's been a change in our timeline for QBR preparation. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

Meeting: QBR preparation Discussion - Pacific Northwest Outfitters
Date: 2024-02-27
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Andrew Taylor (Pacific Northwest Outfitters), Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft), Michelle (Pacific Northwest Outfitters)

[00:01:15] Andrew Taylor (Pacific Northwest Outfitters): Appreciate everyone making time. The main agenda today is QBR preparation.

[00:05:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on integration complexity and found that there's a compliance requirement we hadn't accounted for in the original scope.

[00:07:00] Andrew Taylor (Pacific Northwest Outfitters): The timeline for budget approval is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:10:00] Andrew Taylor (Pacific Northwest Outfitters): The timeline for data residency is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:15:00] Andrew Taylor (Pacific Northwest Outfitters): The timeline for performance requirements is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:19:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on integration complexity and found that the existing infrastructure won't support the target workload without upgrades.

[00:22:00] Andrew Taylor (Pacific Northwest Outfitters): The timeline for resource allocation is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.
